title: Route Incoming Support Request
summary: Review a new support request, determine its priority, and route it to the correct queue.
entry_conditions: A new support request appears in the intake queue.

ticket_id.description: Unique identifier for the incoming support request.

request_text.description: The request body submitted by the user.

entities.name: Urgent Escalations
entities.description: Queue for requests requiring immediate response.
entities.source_hint: Observed in the support routing console.

entities.name: Standard Support
entities.source_hint: Observed in the support routing console.

nodes.name: Open the intake ticket
nodes.instruction: Open the new support request and review the subject, request text, and requester account details.
completion_checks: The ticket details are visible and ready for review.

recovery.instructions: Retry loading the ticket once and stop for review if the intake record still cannot be opened.

nodes.name: Capture routing context
nodes.instruction: Identify any severity indicators, affected product area, and customer impact described in the request.
completion_checks: Severity indicators and product area have been noted.

recovery.instructions: Ask the user for direction if severity, impact, or product area cannot be determined confidently from the ticket.

nodes.name: Is this request urgent?
nodes.question: Does the request indicate production impact, security risk, or executive escalation?
nodes.evaluation_hint: Treat outages, security incidents, and blocked revenue workflows as urgent.

nodes.name: Route to standard queue
nodes.instruction: Assign the request to the standard support queue and note the selected priority.
completion_checks: The request is assigned to Standard Support with a non-urgent priority.

recovery.instructions: Retry the queue assignment once and stop for review if the ticket still cannot be routed to the standard queue.

risk.reason: Queue assignment can be changed later if needed.

nodes.name: Route to urgent queue
nodes.instruction: Assign the request to the urgent escalation queue and mark it for immediate follow-up.
completion_checks: The request is assigned to Urgent Escalations with urgent priority.

recovery.instructions: If the urgent queue is unavailable, record the urgent status and escalate to the on-call workflow for immediate follow-up.

risk.reason: Urgent routing changes queue ownership and response expectations.

transitions.condition: Request is routine and does not require immediate escalation
Request indicates urgent impact or escalation criteria

provenance.observed_vs_inferred_summary: Ticket review and queue assignment were observed. Urgency classification logic was inferred from the routing outcome and playbook guidance.
